title: Born to Run
why_this_song: Born to Run by Bruce Springsteen (1975) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Oh, baby, this town rips the bones from your back"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "'Cause tramps like us"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Baby, we were born to run"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "But I gotta know how it feels"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Wendy let me in, I wanna be your friend"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Baby, we were born to run
Wendy let me in, I wanna be your friend
I wanna guard your dreams and visions

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "baby" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "baby" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "tramps" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "tramps" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: But I gotta know how it feels
On a last chance power drive

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: And the boys try to look so hard
Together, Wendy, we can live with the sadness

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Born to Run" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Born to Run", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Born to Run" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Born to Run" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Born to Run", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Born to Run", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
